words.name: Words of Affirmation
words.description: You feel most loved through verbal compliments, encouragement, and expressions of appreciation.

touch.name: Physical Touch
touch.description: You feel most loved through physical closeness — hugs, kisses, hand-holding, and being near your partner.

time.name: Quality Time
time.description: You feel most loved when your partner gives you their undivided attention and shares meaningful experiences.

gifts.name: Receiving Gifts
gifts.description: You feel most loved through thoughtful gifts and gestures that show your partner was thinking of you.

service.name: Acts of Service
service.description: You feel most loved when your partner helps you with tasks, takes care of things, and eases your burden.
